case_title: CHECKRITE vs. FAIR, ANDRA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHECKRITE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-09-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY RICHARD J FOLMER. HEARING SET FOR AUG-18-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHECKRITE AS TO DEFENDANT FAIR, ANDRA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-09-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-21-1999

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-18-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-18-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY RICHARD FOLMER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAY PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-02-1999 CONTINUED FROM AUG-18-1999 TO SEP-29-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
